name: UploadThing
description: UploadThing is a file upload service designed for modern web apps. It handles file uploads, storage, and delivery with built-in support for presigned URLs, access control, and file management.

capabilities.name: upload_files
capabilities.description: Upload one or more files directly to UploadThing from your server. Returns file URLs and metadata after successful upload.

capabilities.name: upload_files_from_url
capabilities.description: Upload files by providing external URLs. UploadThing will fetch and store the files, useful for migrating content or importing from other services.

capabilities.name: list_files
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all uploaded files with their metadata including size, type, URL, and upload date.

capabilities.name: delete_files
capabilities.description: Delete one or more files by their file key or custom ID. Permanently removes the files from storage.

capabilities.name: rename_files
capabilities.description: Rename one or more uploaded files. Updates the file name metadata without changing the file key or URL.

capabilities.name: get_signed_url
capabilities.description: Generate a time-limited presigned URL for accessing a private file. Useful for granting temporary access to protected content.

capabilities.name: update_acl
capabilities.description: Change the access control level of a file between public-read and private. Controls whether the file is publicly accessible or requires signed URLs.
